seo.home: The official website of mizzz—portfolio, latest updates, pricing guidance, store, fanclub, and contact for new projects.
seo.works: Browse works in film, photography, and music.
seo.fanclub: Exclusive content for fan club members.
seo.store: mizzz store page with Stripe-first purchase flow for goods, photo books, and limited items.
seo.contact: Get in touch or submit a work request.
seo.about: About the creator — bio, skills, and experience.
seo.pricing: Pricing guide for video, photo, music, and web projects.
seo.faq: Frequently asked questions about requests, production, and pricing.

about.headline: Creator — Film, Photo & Music
about.subHeadline: Exploring the boundary between digital and analog.
about.bio1: A creator working across film, photography, and music. From commercial projects to personal work, I pursue the right expression for each theme.
about.bio2: I specialize in brand building and world-building, shaping the client's vision through both visual and sonic elements.
about.approachText: Rather than just fulfilling a brief, I start by clarifying what you want to communicate. I propose the most fitting expression for the goal, and care about building something we're both proud of.
about.nowText: Currently focused on a new video series and ongoing web application maintenance & development projects.
about.availableText: Open to new projects and consultations.
about.limitedText: Currently available for small-scope projects only.
about.unavailableText: Not taking on new projects at this time. Please check back soon.
about.toolsDesc: Technologies I use day-to-day for production and development
about.worldviewDesc: By working across film, photography, and music, I reach emotional layers that no single discipline can access alone. That is the creative mizzz pursues.
about.ctaHeadline: Let's create something that reaches people.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Estimated rates for creative work
pricing.note: All prices vary depending on project scope, requirements, and timeline. Feel free to get in touch for a free estimate.
pricing.ctaSub: Free estimates available. No commitment required.

hero.headline: Build a brand story that converts into real requests.
hero.subCopy: Film, photo, music, and web—planned as one consistent experience.

playful.storeHiddenQuote: Choosing things you love with care shapes who you are.

playful.fcHiddenQuote: Being a member is a quiet kind of special.

guide.title: Guide
guide.subtitle: Pre-purchase information
guide.lead: Here is an overview of information to check before making a purchase.
guide.contactNote: For store inquiries, please use the contact form on mizzz.jp.

shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.subtitle: Delivery methods and timelines
shipping.description: Shipping policy for mizzz Official Store.
shipping.standard: Standard items ship within 5–8 business days after your order is confirmed.
shipping.preorder: Pre-order and made-to-order items follow the timeline stated on each product page.
shipping.domestic: Domestic shipping (Japan, JST) is standard. International shipping is being rolled out in phases.
shipping.feeBody: Shipping fees apply except where noted. Please check the product page or checkout for the exact amount.
shipping.trackingBody: A tracking number will be sent by email once your order has shipped. Tracking becomes active within 24 hours of dispatch.
shipping.delayBody: Delays may occur during peak periods, severe weather, or due to carrier conditions. Please contact us in advance if you have a time-sensitive order.

returns.title: Returns & Exchanges
returns.subtitle: Conditions and process
returns.description: Returns and exchange policy for mizzz Official Store.
returns.noReturn: Returns and exchanges due to customer preference are not accepted in principle.
returns.defective: For defective or incorrect items, please contact us within 7 days of receiving your order.
returns.digital: Digital products cannot be returned after purchase due to their nature.
returns.contactNote: For returns and exchanges, please reach us via the
returns.procedureTitle: How to request a return or exchange
returns.step1: Contact us via the contact page within 7 days of receiving your item.
returns.step2: We will verify the defect or error, then provide a return address.
returns.step3: Once your return is received, we will arrange a replacement or refund.
returns.noteBody: Returns due to customer preference are not accepted. Opened or used items may not qualify for exchange even in cases of defect.

support.title: Support Center
support.description: Find answers across FAQ, guides, and policies before contacting us.
support.beforeContactDescription: Please check FAQ and guides first. If not resolved, continue to the contact form.
support.preFormDescription: Check related FAQ/guides before submitting to solve faster.
support.noResultsDescription: Try different keywords or categories, or use the quick links at the top.
support.postSubmitHelpDescription: While waiting for a reply, check related help for additional guidance.

main.title: A brand hub connecting main / store / fanclub
main.description: We reorganized key paths so first-time and returning visitors can understand what to see and where to go next.
main.highlightStoryTitle: Lead with world view and activity context
main.highlightStoryDesc: Works, news, and events are connected as one coherent brand narrative.
main.highlightRoutingTitle: Clear routing from main to store / fanclub
main.highlightRoutingDesc: Discovery, purchase, and membership actions remain visible throughout the page.
main.highlightTrustDesc: FAQ / Guide / Contact are linked in one continuous support flow.

store.title: Store experience balancing excitement and reassurance
store.description: Even with fewer products, editorial blocks, guide links, and member bridges keep the storefront meaningful.
store.highlightSalesTitle: Feature new / limited / pickup at the top
store.highlightSalesDesc: Fixed campaign and pickup entry points shorten the path to purchase decisions.
store.highlightGuideDesc: Shipping, returns, FAQ, and contact are connected in one support flow.
store.highlightMemberDesc: Cross-site CTAs guide visitors to early access and member perks.

fc.title: Membership experience that encourages continuity
fc.description: Join / Login / MyPage flow is simplified while benefit value and exclusivity become clearer.
fc.highlightWeeklyDesc: Returning members can instantly see what is newly available this week.
fc.highlightBenefitDesc: Limited access, early access, and member store routes are integrated in one area.
fc.highlightSupportTitle: Support flow before and after joining
fc.highlightSupportDesc: Users can move quickly to FAQ / Guide / Contact without confusion.

visuals.leadDefault: A resilient visual layout that works without assets and scales up when CMS images are swapped.
visuals.collectionCaptionDefault: Featured visual slot managed from CMS.
visuals.featureCaption: Main card to express mood through featured content.
visuals.pickupCaption: Compact banner for new and highlighted updates.
visuals.campaignCaption: Operational slot for seasonal and limited campaigns.

main.title: Brand Visual Highlights
main.lead: Visual layer that extends the hero mood and keeps hub navigation clear.

store.title: Store Visual Highlights
store.lead: Keeps shelf density even with fewer items and boosts campaign appeal when needed.

fanclub.title: Member Visual Highlights
fanclub.lead: Strengthens premium member feel while guiding benefits and updates.

lifecycle.guestTitle: Sign in to unlock a connected main / store / fc experience.
lifecycle.guestDescription: Start by signing in and check your status plus next actions in My Page.
lifecycle.suspendedDescription: Please contact support to review your status and next steps.
lifecycle.graceTitle: You are in a grace membership period.
lifecycle.graceDescription: Review renewal options to keep your member experience active.
lifecycle.expiredDescription: Rejoin to restore member-only content and benefits.
lifecycle.memberDescription: Use member-only content, early access, and exclusive guidance.
lifecycle.onboardingTitle: Complete initial setup to personalize your experience.
lifecycle.onboardingDescription: Set profile, notifications, and interests now (you can resume later).
lifecycle.nonMemberDescription: Explore main / store / fc first, then join when a benefit matches your interest.
lifecycle.renewalSoonDescription: Check your next billing date, member benefits, and recent updates before deciding to continue.
lifecycle.paymentFailedDescription: Update your payment method to restore your member experience without interruption.
lifecycle.reactivatedTitle: Welcome back. Your membership has been reactivated.
lifecycle.reactivatedDescription: Check recent updates, limited content, and perks to restart smoothly.

status.desc: Prioritize user impact and current state. Check recommended actions before technical details.
